chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-2252 of 2018 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 9689/2018 2. For hearing of main case 20-03-2025 Mr. Shah Bakht Pirzada Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Iqbal M. Khurram Advocate for the Respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel for the Respondent department the impugned notice is being withdrawn forthwith, however, the Respondent department may remain at liberty to initiate proceedings if permissible under the law. In view hereof learned counsel for the Petitioner states that the petition has served its purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad PS
